name: Greek Lamb Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 dozen small white onions, blanched and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour with salt and pepper to make a seasoned dredging mixture.
2. Dredge lamb cubes in the seasoned flour mixture.
3. Heat olive oil in a large soup pot over medium-high heat.
4. Brown lamb cubes in the oil.
5. Sprinkle herbs and garlic over the browned lamb.
6. Add chicken stock, white wine, and tomato sauce to the pot.
7. Season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
8. Simmer the stew on medium heat for 1-1/2 hours.
9. Add blanched onions and black olives.
10. Continue simmering for an additional 1/2 hour.
